content:
| ID | Type | Title | Priority | Acceptance Criteria |
|----|------|-------|----------|---------------------|
| R1 | builtin | Numeric builtins match CPython | P0 | `abs`, `pow`, `round`, `divmod`, `bin`, `hex`, `oct`, `int`, `float`, `bool`, `complex` produce identical results including edge cases (overflow, NaN, inf, negative zero, large ints) |
| R2 | builtin | Type/introspection builtins match CPython | P0 | `type`, `isinstance`, `issubclass`, `id`, `hash`, `dir`, `vars`, `callable`, `getattr`, `setattr`, `delattr`, `hasattr` — identical results including error branches (TypeError, AttributeError) |
| R3 | builtin | String/repr builtins match CPython | P0 | `str`, `repr`, `format`, `chr`, `ord`, `ascii` — identical results for all types, Unicode edge cases, format specs |
| R4 | builtin | Collection builtins match CPython | P0 | `len`, `sorted`, `reversed`, `enumerate`, `zip`, `map`, `filter`, `range`, `min`, `max`, `sum`, `all`, `any`, `iter`, `next` — identical results including empty iterables, key functions, default values |
| R5 | builtin | IO builtins match CPython | P0 | `print` with sep/end/file kwargs, `input` (where applicable), `open` read/write modes — identical stdout |
| R6 | stdlib | math module match CPython | P0 | `math.floor`, `math.ceil`, `math.sqrt`, `math.log`, `math.sin`/`cos`/`tan`, `math.pi`, `math.e`, `math.inf`, `math.nan`, `math.isnan`, `math.isinf`, `math.isfinite`, `math.factorial`, `math.gcd`, `math.lcm`, `math.comb`, `math.perm` — identical results |
| R7 | stdlib | json module match CPython | P0 | `json.dumps`, `json.loads`, `json.dump`, `json.load`, default serializer, indent, sort_keys, ensure_ascii, special floats (nan, inf) — identical results |
| R8 | stdlib | re module match CPython | P0 | `re.match`, `re.search`, `re.findall`, `re.finditer`, `re.sub`, `re.split`, `re.compile`, flags (IGNORECASE, MULTILINE, DOTALL), groups, named groups — identical results |
| R9 | stdlib | collections module match CPython | P0 | `OrderedDict`, `defaultdict`, `Counter`, `deque`, `namedtuple`, `ChainMap` — identical results for all methods |
| R10 | stdlib | datetime module match CPython | P0 | `datetime.datetime`, `datetime.date`, `datetime.time`, `datetime.timedelta`, `strftime`, `strptime`, arithmetic, comparison — identical results |
| R11 | stdlib | os/pathlib/sys modules match CPython | P0 | `os.path.join`, `os.path.exists`, `os.getcwd`, `pathlib.Path` operations, `sys.version_info`, `sys.platform`, `sys.argv`, `sys.maxsize` — identical results (platform-appropriate) |
| R12 | stdlib | itertools/functools modules match CPython | P0 | `itertools.chain`, `itertools.islice`, `itertools.product`, `itertools.permutations`, `itertools.combinations`, `itertools.groupby`, `itertools.count`, `itertools.cycle`, `itertools.repeat`; `functools.reduce`, `functools.partial`, `functools.lru_cache`, `functools.wraps` — identical results |
| R13 | stdlib | Remaining top-16 stdlib modules match CPython | P0 | `io.StringIO`/`BytesIO`, `csv.reader`/`writer`, `hashlib.md5`/`sha256`, `struct.pack`/`unpack`, `random.randint`/`random.choice`/`random.shuffle` (with seed) — identical results |
| R14 | language | Decorator conformance match CPython | P0 | Stacked decorators applied bottom-up, parameterized decorators `@deco(arg)`, class decorators, `functools.wraps` preserves `__name__`/`__doc__`, decorator return value is the wrapper (not None) — identical behavior |
| R15 | language | Class system conformance match CPython | P0 | Single/multiple inheritance, C3 MRO, `super()` in all positions, `__init_subclass__`, class/static methods, property descriptors, `__slots__`, `__class_getitem__`, abstract base classes — identical behavior |
| R16 | language | Exception conformance match CPython | P0 | Exception hierarchy (`BaseException` → `Exception` → specific), exception chaining (`raise X from Y`), `__cause__`/`__context__`/`__traceback__`, `ExceptionGroup`, `except*`, custom exception classes with attributes — identical behavior |
| R17 | language | Pattern matching conformance match CPython | P0 | `match`/`case` with literal, capture, wildcard, OR, sequence, mapping, class, guard patterns — identical behavior including edge cases (nested patterns, star patterns, value patterns) |
| R18 | language | Comprehension scope conformance match CPython | P0 | List/dict/set comprehension variable scoping (PEP 709), nested comprehensions, generator expressions as comprehension source, walrus operator in comprehension — identical behavior |
| R19 | language | F-string conformance match CPython (PEP 701) | P0 | Nested f-strings, same-quote reuse, backslash in expression, lambda in f-string, format specs with nested braces, multi-line f-string expressions — identical behavior |
| R20 | language | Context manager conformance match CPython | P0 | `with` statement, `__enter__`/`__exit__` protocol, multiple context managers, exception suppression via `__exit__` returning True, nested with blocks — identical behavior |
| R21 | language | Lambda and closure conformance match CPython | P0 | Lambda expressions, closures over mutable variables, nested lambdas, lambda as default arg, lambda in comprehension — identical behavior |
| R22 | framework | Automated conformance CLI runner | P0 | `cclab mamba test --conformance` discovers all `.py` fixtures under `tests/fixtures/conformance/`, runs each through JIT pipeline, compares stdout against `.expected` golden files, reports pass/fail/xfail summary, exits non-zero on any unexpected failure |

### Constraints

- All existing conformance fixtures must continue to pass (no regressions)
- Test harness: `.py` fixture + `.expected` golden file, run via `conformance_tests.rs`
- Golden files generated by running fixtures under CPython 3.12
- Each new fixture must cover edge cases not in existing fixtures
- No changes to runtime implementation in this spec — test-only; implementation bugs found are tracked as separate issues
- Generator/iterator conformance covered by sibling spec `generator-iterator-conformance`
- Data structure conformance covered by sibling spec `data-structure-conformance`
- Async generators/asyncio event loop remain unsupported (xfail — #800, #801)
